watch_list.user_notes: Fresh listing, all units occupied at market, Terra reachable. Cap rate looks passable at ask, run the numbers formally.
Third price cut coming maybe, watch. One unit vacant is a lease-up risk.
Older roof needs work, would blow the first-year work ceiling in the deal box. Watching for a price cut only.
AE flood zone, insurance renewal risk. Watch, do not act.
